diagrams.title: E-R Diagram Basic Symbols
diagrams.description: Standard symbols used in Entity-Relationship diagrams
elements: Line = Connection between entities and relationships
diagrams.purpose: Learn standard E-R notation conventions for database design

diagrams.title: Cardinality Types Visualization
elements: 1:N (One-to-Many) - single line one side, crow's foot other
diagrams.purpose: Understand how to represent number of entity associations in relationships

diagrams.title: Entity with All Attribute Types
diagrams.description: Complete example showing all attribute classifications on one entity
elements: Composite attribute: Name (composed of First, Middle, Last)
Derived: Age (calculated from DOB - dashed oval)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how different attribute types look in an ERD
